name: pcap-hunter
desc: 🔍 AI-assisted threat-hunting workbench for SOC and DFIR analysts — turns raw PCAPs into actionable intel with a Zeek + tshark pipeline, C2/beacon detection, J…
descFull: 🔍 AI-assisted threat-hunting workbench for SOC and DFIR analysts — turns raw PCAPs into actionable intel with a Zeek + tshark pipeline, C2/beacon detection, JA3 fingerprinting, MITRE ATT&CK mapping, OSINT enrichment, and multilingual reports from local or cloud LLMs.
